runners.comment: Badly out of form over 6f in recent months and has stamina to prove

runners.name: Honorary
runners.spotlight: Came good at eighth attempt, with front-running C&D win last month; well drawn to attack again and might use that success as a springboard.
runners.comment: Won from the front over C&D last month and is well drawn to attack from the front again
runners.owner: Yip Yuk Kit & Dr Tommy Yip Chun Ming

runners.name: Tactical Command
runners.spotlight: Stays 7f but is much better known as a sprinter; without a win and has very mixed record this season; not the percentage call.
runners.comment: Without a win and has very mixed record this season; not the percentage call

runners.name: Francis Meynell
runners.spotlight: 0-17 in Hong Kong but runner-up twice over C&D in recent weeks and nicely drawn on the inside today; big player if first-time blinkers give him a boost.
runners.comment: 0-17 in HK but runner-up twice over C&D in recent weeks and has good draw today
runners.owner: Albert Hung Chao Hong & Kevin Hung Dingteng

runners.name: Nyx Gluck
runners.spotlight: Scored over C&D for Cody Mo in December and was placed over C&D in cheekpieces on final two starts for that stable; goes without headgear and has wide draw on debut for Danny Shum but booking of Zac Purton catches the eye.
runners.comment: Signed off for Cody Mo in good form and Zac Purton rides on stable debut

runners.name: Amo Ergo Sum
runners.spotlight: Reserve; looked suited by step up in trip when sixth over C&D last month, his fifth start; now needs to build on that effort.
runners.comment: Ran okay over C&D when upped in trip last month; now needs to build on that

runners.name: Aca Fast
runners.spotlight: Showed only minor promise on his two 6f starts and needs this extra furlong to unlock improvement.
runners.comment: Showed only minor promise on his two 6f starts; upped in trip today

runners.name: Beauty Award
runners.spotlight: Unexposed 3yo who made quite promising debut when keeping-on sixth here (6f) in May; no surprise if he gets a bit closer to the target over this longer trip.
runners.comment: Quite promising debut when sixth over 6f here in May; upped in trip today

runners.name: Call Me Sparkle
runners.spotlight: Yet to make any significant further progress since winning over 6f here on debut in March but kept on for third over C&D when upped in trip last month and has each-way claims again, despite his much tougher draw.
runners.comment: Placed over C&D when upped in trip last month; each-way claims despite wide draw

runners.name: Big Big World
runners.spotlight: Always behind when a 56-1 outsider for debut here (6f) last month.
runners.comment: Always behind when a 56-1 outsider for debut here (6f) last month

runners.name: Circuit Fiery
runners.spotlight: Consistent 6yo who has collected two C&D wins this season; likely to give another good account but has tough draw and career-high mark to contend with.
runners.comment: Consistent 6yo; two C&D wins this season; on tough mark and drawn wide
runners.owner: Jason Cheung Cho Yee & Cheung Ka Shing

runners.name: Prestige Come
runners.spotlight: Made low-key debut when a 40-1 outsider over C&D this month; remains best watched.
runners.comment: Made low-key debut when a 40-1 outsider over C&D this month

races.race_name: Riding High Together Handicap (Class 4) (Course C) (Turf)

runners.name: Amazing Duck
runners.spotlight: Has modest strike-rate and is no longer the force of old but made the frame over C&D on his last two outings and continues to edge down the weights; Zac Purton rides today; obvious each-way claims.
runners.comment: Not the force of old but in the frame over C&D on last two appearances

runners.name: Derrynblue
runners.spotlight: Reserve; not beaten far when seventh over 7f here last month but is yet to be placed after seven runs (two over 1m).
runners.comment: Not beaten far when seventh over 7f here last month but yet to be placed after seven runs
runners.owner: Kenneth Kong Siu Chee & Elaine Kong Yick Ning

runners.name: Grand Turbo
runners.spotlight: Reserve; six-race maiden; made the frame at triple-digit odds on soft ground here (1m1f) in May but two lesser efforts have followed.
runners.comment: Twice well-held since big-odds fourth here (1m1f) in May; others preferred

runners.name: Family Fortune
runners.spotlight: Three Class 5 wins at Happy Valley this season, the latest four weeks ago; evidently in good nick but combination of latest 6lb rise and a rise in grade might leave him vulnerable.
runners.comment: Three Class 5 wins this season; might be vulnerable in this grade after latest 6lb rise
runners.owner: Tony Stradmoor, Billy Li Sze Kuen Et Al

runners.name: Beauty Viva
runners.spotlight: 1-24 in Hong Kong, the win gained at Happy Valley (1m) in March; still 3lb above that mark and needs to up his game after some below-par efforts.
runners.comment: Recent efforts have been below par and he's still 3lb above his winning mark

runners.name: Flying Boom
runners.spotlight: Scored over C&D in February and emerged from a dip in form when close fifth here last month; still on a workable mark; a possible.
runners.comment: Seemingly back in good form when close fifth here last month; still on a workable mark
runners.owner: Raymond Tsang Heung Tak & Kenneth Tsang Heung Kan

runners.name: Ninja Derby
runners.spotlight: Dual Class 5 winner (once over C&D) for new stable in early part of this season but has found things tougher in this grade since the turn of the year.
runners.comment: Has found things tough in this higher grade since the turn of the year
runners.owner: Wilson Chan Wai Kwok, Joseph Yim Wai Ho & Gary Ng Ka Wai

runners.name: Ka Ying Superb
runners.spotlight: Runner-up in higher-grade company on seasonal debut in September (7f) but generally very disappointing since; needs to turn things around.
runners.comment: Second on seasonal debut (7f) in September but generally very disappointing since

runners.name: Best World
runners.spotlight: Unexposed 3yo; launched career with two encouraging runs here in May (7f/1m) but needs to take a step forward today.
runners.comment: Launched career with two encouraging runs (7f/1m) but needs improvement today

runners.name: Lucky Balerion
runners.spotlight: Unplaced over 7f on first three starts but evidently well suited by step up in trip when close second over C&D in May; drawn wide today but has scope for further progress.
runners.comment: Improved form when close second over C&D in May; respected, despite wide draw

runners.name: Ace
runners.spotlight: Just held on to score in refitted blinkers over C&D last month and is now 2-4 for current stable; might still be on the upgrade; shortlisted.
runners.comment: Narrow C&D winner last month and now 2-4 for stable; shortlisted

runners.name: Jolly Brilliant
runners.spotlight: A maiden after seven runs but kept on well to take fourth from stall 14 over C&D in May and has now made the frame on his last three outings; ought to be on the premises again.
runners.comment: 0-7 but made the frame on last three outings; probably in the shake-up again

runners.name: Chill Partners
runners.spotlight: Came good at fourth attempt, with narrow 7f course win in March, but form has nosedived since; moves up in trip with a lot to prove.
runners.comment: Form has nosedived since narrow 7f course win in March; tries a new trip

runners.name: Jumbo Steps
runners.spotlight: Well down the field when upped to 1m2f here recently and has now been unplaced all four Hong Kong starts; drops in grade today but still makes only limited appeal.
runners.comment: Unplaced all four HK starts; drops in grade but still makes only limited appeal

runners.name: Mega Mastermind
runners.spotlight: Opened account over C&D in March and ran at least as well when second here the following month; not quite in same form lately, though, and has awkward draw today.
runners.comment: C&D winner in March; not quite in same form lately and has awkward draw today

runners.name: Prestige Hall
runners.spotlight: Overcame wide draw and some traffic to score over 7f here last month, his 12th start; went up 7lb for that but could quite plausibly have untapped potential over this new trip.
runners.comment: Overcame wide draw and some traffic to score over 7f here last month; unexposed over 1m

races.race_name: Sportsmanship Handicap (Class 3) (Course C) (Turf)

runners.name: Embraces
runners.spotlight: Placed twice since cheekpieces were refitted in May, more recently when running-on third at Happy Valley (1m); remains well handicapped and will be a tough nut to crack if switch to first-time visor has any positive effect.
runners.comment: Placed twice since cheekpieces went back on; still on good mark; visor now tried
runners.owner: Thomas Chung Yat Fan & Joe Ho Pui Lung

runners.name: Yuen Long Elite
runners.spotlight: Won twice (once over C&D) last season but has gone the wrong way since an encouraging reappearance run in September; others have much less to prove.
runners.comment: Has gone the wrong way since encouraging seasonal debut in September
runners.owner: Friend Of Yuen Long Merchants Assn Syndicate

runners.name: Shanwah
runners.spotlight: Sixth at big odds over C&D in April but quickly back in the doldrums on next two outings and has it all to prove again.
runners.comment: Quickly back in the doldrums since big-odds since here in April; too risky

runners.name: Another World
runners.spotlight: Won on dirt in early part of this season but has been badly out of form on turf in recent months; needs to turn things around.
runners.comment: Won on dirt in early part of season but badly out of form on turf in recent months

runners.name: Goldfield
runners.spotlight: Won 7f maiden on second of his two appearances in Brazil but struggled on first two Hong Kong starts (both C&D).
runners.comment: Struggled on first two Hong Kong starts (both C&D)
runners.owner: Yue Yun Hing & Anita Yue Lam Chik Sun

runners.name: Hymnbook
runners.spotlight: Quite useful when trained in Britain and has showed promise on three of his four Hong Kong starts, most recently when keeping-on sixth over C&D in May; another 2lb lower today; could have a say.
runners.comment: 0-4 in HK but showed clear promise on three of those outings; could have a say
runners.owner: Mr & Mrs Stephen Ho Wai Man, F Ho Ka Chun & D Ho Ka Chung

runners.name: Trinity Treasure
runners.spotlight: Belied huge odds when fourth over C&D in April, his second Hong Kong start, but was unable to land a telling blow here last month; swaps cheekpieces for blinkers today.
runners.comment: Fourth at huge odds over C&D in April but unable to land a blow here last month
runners.owner: Zhao Guoming, Xiao Bing, Annie An Ran & Tan Meng Sha

runners.name: Complete Unknown
runners.spotlight: Reserve; 0-5 in Hong Kong but close third over C&D on both starts since upped in trip in May; will warrant consideration if he gets a run.
runners.comment: 0-5 in Hong Kong but close third over C&D on both starts since upped in trip in May

runners.name: Seward
runners.spotlight: Signed off in Ireland with two 7f wins in April 2025 but has been soundly beaten on all three Hong Kong starts this season (7f-1m).
runners.comment: Soundly beaten on all three Hong Kong starts (7f-1m)
runners.owner: David Philip Boehm & Anthony Cheung Hin Shun

runners.name: Outgate
runners.spotlight: Won off much-reduced mark at Happy Valley (6f) in February and is also suited by this C&D but recent efforts have been underwhelming and younger rivals have much more appealing profiles.
runners.comment: Won off reduced mack in February but recent efforts have been underwhelming

runners.name: Lucky Sam Gor
runners.spotlight: Began this year with two course wins (7f/1m); still in good form and has better draw than last time but needs to find hidden reserves to overcome current mark.
runners.comment: Began year with two course wins; needs to find hidden reserves to overcome this mark

runners.name: Power Of Vitam
runners.spotlight: Caused 46-1 surprise over C&D in February, his second Hong Kong start, and finished well to make the frame on last couple of outings; can be dangerous under Zac Purton if he gets a strong pace to aim at.
runners.comment: Finished well to make the frame on last two outings; Zac Purton takes the ride today

runners.name: Amazing Partners
runners.spotlight: Progressive 4yo who scored over C&D when upped in trip in April and has made the frame over C&D on both starts since; may yet have a bigger effort in him; respected.
runners.comment: C&D winner when upped in trip in April and twice in the frame since; respected
runners.owner: Thomas Liang Cheung Biu & Elizabeth Lee Wong Sing Fung

runners.name: Fortune Boy
runners.spotlight: Reserve; drops in grade after contesting 1m4f Group 3 handicap in May and has a workable mark but would appeal more over further.
runners.comment: On a workable mark but would appeal more over further
runners.owner: Ricky Wong Kin Chat & Helen Leung Yee Wan

runners.name: Sky Vino
runners.spotlight: Dual dirt winner this year; managed only sixth off this career-high mark over C&D in May and has much wider draw today but Nichola Yuen's 10lb claim will be helpful.
runners.comment: On tough mark now and drawn wide today but Nichola Yuen's 10lb claim will help

runners.name: Flow Water Flow
runners.spotlight: Low-mileage 4yo who won by a short head on consecutive appearances here in January/February (1m/1m1f); this hat-trick attempt comes after a break but further progress is possible.
runners.comment: Absent since two narrow course wins at start of year but further progress is possible
runners.owner: Dr & Mrs Henry H L Chan

races.race_name: Better Future Handicap (Class 3) (Course C) (Turf)

runners.name: Mr Desira
runners.spotlight: Won twice in lower-grade company at Happy Valley (6f/5f) in early part of this season but has lost his way a bit since; others in this line-up have much stronger claims.
runners.comment: Has lost his way since winning twice in early part of this season

runners.name: All Out For Six
runners.spotlight: Reserve; launched Hong Kong career with five respectable runs, finishing either fifth or six each time, but his latest 2lb drop is not enough to tempt.
runners.comment: All five HK runs were respectable but his latest 2lb drop is not enough to tempt
runners.owner: James Lau Po Man & Alice Woo Wai See

runners.name: Lady's Choice
runners.spotlight: Not at his best this year but handicapped accordingly now and was close up from a double-digit draw over C&D last month; can make his presence felt again.
runners.comment: Close up from double-digit draw over C&D last month; one to consider
runners.owner: HK Association Of Lady Horse Lovers Syndicate

runners.name: Effortless Win
runners.spotlight: Scored by a neck over C&D on debut in May and ran well in defeat here last month; probably still has potential; high on the list.
runners.comment: Scored over C&D on debut and ran well in defeat next time; respected
runners.owner: 25/26 Frankie Lor Fu Chuen Trainer Syndicate (2)

runners.name: Tactical Ace
runners.spotlight: Yet to make a splash after four runs in Hong Kong and seemingly in need of a drop in grade.
runners.comment: Yet to make a splash after four runs in Hong Kong; needs a drop in grade

runners.name: Kansas
runners.spotlight: Smart 2yo when based in Ireland but a down-the-field outsider on all six Hong Kong starts.
runners.comment: Smart 2yo when based in Ireland but a down-the-field outsider on all six HK starts

runners.name: Matters Most
runners.spotlight: Three-time C&D winner; much more exposed than some of his rivals but has been back in good form in recent months and Nichola Yuen's 10lb claim gives him some wiggle room; considered each-way.
runners.comment: More exposed than some but in good form and has good 10lb claimer enlisted

runners.name: Motor
runners.spotlight: Improving 4yo who has collected three 6f wins (one here) this season and made good late headway to take third off today's mark at Happy Valley last month; probably needs to take another step forward today, though.
runners.comment: Three wins this season; placed off this mark last month; needs another step forward

runners.name: Invincible Steed
runners.spotlight: Won over 5f in Australia last year and made promising Hong Kong debut when third over that trip here last month; drawn wide for first 6f attempt but still enters calculations.
runners.comment: Made promising Hong Kong debut over 5f here last month; enters calculations

runners.name: Northern Fire Ball
runners.spotlight: Reserve; has twice made all in Class 4 company this season but was reeled in fairly comfortably when back up in this grade last month and will probably remain vulnerable at this level.
runners.comment: Dual Class 4 winner this season; probably vulnerable at this level

runners.name: Tycoon Resources
runners.spotlight: Exciting 3yo who won comfortably when upped to 6f at Happy Valley last month and is now 3-3; another 9lb higher for first run here but it's hard to gauge the limit of his ability.
runners.comment: Exciting 3yo who won comfortably when upped to 6f last month and is now 3-3

runners.name: Szeryng
runners.spotlight: Generally progressive 4yo who posted a good effort when placed behind Tycoon Resources at Happy Valley last month, after a break; competes off same mark here but has much tougher draw this time.
runners.comment: Ran well at Happy Valley last month but has much tougher draw here
runners.owner: Dr Edwin Lam Chi Wan & Jason Lam Che Man

runners.name: Super Strong Kid
runners.spotlight: Dual 5f course winner last year; made nothing better than a satisfactory reappearance over that trip last month but remains unexposed over 6f and lightly raced in general; contender if that recent outing brought him on.
runners.comment: Dual 5f winner; ran okay last month, after a break, and still has low mileage
runners.owner: Mr & Mrs Chan Hou Bo & Chan Jenny Chun Lai

runners.name: Quantum Cloud
runners.spotlight: Made quite promising Hong Kong debut when fourth over C&D in February but we haven't seen him since a lesser effort the following month and he's poorly drawn today.
runners.comment: Made promising HK debut in February; off since lesser run in March; drawn wide
